message:
test(tailer): add wa-124z4 LabRuntime deterministic tests for tailer primitives

8 LabRuntime tests in tailer::tests::labruntime_tailer exercising the
Cx-aware channel primitives, CaptureScheduler budget enforcement, and
pure-data type contracts under deterministic virtual-time scheduling:

1. tailer_config_defaults — pin adaptive-polling and concurrency defaults
2. capture_scheduler_rate_limit — finite captures/sec throttles after exhaustion
3. capture_scheduler_byte_budget — byte recording deducts from global budget
4. scheduler_snapshot_serde_roundtrip — telemetry shape stability
5. capture_event_channel_delivery — FIFO via two-phase reserve/commit
6. capture_event_channel_backpressure — full channel rejects, accepts after drain
7. capture_recv_cancelled_cx — cancelled Cx surfaces as recv error
8. tailer_metrics_defaults — all counters start at zero

All 96 tailer::tests pass (88 existing CompatRuntime + 8 new LabRuntime).
benches/tailer.rs already pre-exists (266 LOC).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
